words.zh: n. 射擊, 狩獵, 芽, 射傷, 發射, 發芽, 急流, 推力, 攝影, 急送, 滑運道, 浪費

words.def: a person who invites guests to a social event (such as a party in his or her own home) and who is responsible for them while they are there
words.zh: n. 主人, 旅館老闆, 節目主持人

words.def: the act of firing a projectile
words.zh: n. 發射, 炮彈, 射擊, 射手, 投籃, 射門, 子彈, 射程, 拍攝, 注射

words.def: to a degree exceeding normal or proper limits
words.zh: adv. 也, 非常, 太

words.def: used of physical heat; having a high or higher than desirable temperature or giving off heat or feeling or causing a sensation of heat or burning
words.zh: a. 熱的, 熱心的, 辣的, 熱情的, 激動的, 猛烈的, 緊迫的
